extra.reasoning: The property requires NOT (rec_drug_a AND rec_drug_b). rec_drug_a is set true only by rec_a_from_conjunction (priority 50), which requires the 8-way conjunction peptic_ulcer AND hepatic_impairment AND elderly AND heart_failure AND prior_gi_bleed AND immunosuppressed AND polypharmacy AND bradycardia. rec_drug_b is set true by rec_b_from_trigger (priority 50) whenever peptic_ulcer is true. Crucially, peptic_ulcer is one of the conjuncts required for rec_drug_a. Therefore every input that fires rec_a_from_conjunction also fires rec_b_from_trigger. There is no rule that ever sets rec_drug_a or rec_drug_b to false, and the defaults only apply to outputs left unset, so neither output can be overridden. Setting all 8 conjuncts true (and the irrelevant hypertension/diabetes/renal_impairment false, which only affect rec_drug_c) yields rec_drug_a = true and rec_drug_b = true simultaneously, violating mutual exclusion.
